title: Text Representation Path
description: Build fluency in Text Representation inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: WordPiece
steps.summary: WordPiece belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Text Representation. It sits inside Representation Learning / Text Representation. Compare it with SentencePiece and Word Contextualization. It opens into WordPiece Embedding and WordPiece Embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Character.ai
steps.summary: Character.ai belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Text Representation. It sits inside Representation Learning / Text Representation. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: SentencePiece
steps.summary: SentencePiece belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Text Representation. It sits inside Representation Learning / Text Representation. Compare it with WordPiece and Word Contextualization. It opens into SentencePiece Embedding and SentencePiece Tokenization.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Subword Mixup
steps.summary: Subword Mixup belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Text Representation. It sits inside Representation Learning / Text Representation. Start after Mixup.

steps.title: Word cloud
steps.summary: Word cloud belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Text Representation. It sits inside Representation Learning / Text Representation. Compare it with Word Contextualization and Topic Word Removal.
